text_template: Support for this show comes from Quince. You make difficult choices each and every day. So why does your outfit need to be one of them? Think 100% European linen shorts and shirts from $34, lightweight, breathable, and comfortable, but still look put together. And clean 100% Pima cotton tees with a softness that has to be felt. So Quince recently sent me their organic comfort stretch chore jacket. I got it in the tobacco color. It's not too heavy. It's not too light.
